sourceText: 这家公司去年亏损严重，裁掉了30%的员工，现在正在寻找新的投资者。
referenceTranslation: This company, which suffered heavy losses and laid off 30% of its employees last year, is now looking for new investors.

sourceText: Many of the buildings destroyed in the earthquake were constructed without proper safety standards.
referenceTranslation: 地震摧毁了许多建筑。这些建筑当初建造时，没有遵循适当的安全标准。

sourceText: 你不来，我不走。
referenceTranslation: I will not leave if you do not come.

sourceText: 那所房子你们早该修了。
referenceTranslation: You should have repaired that house long ago.

sourceText: 我们要加强环境保护的工作。
referenceTranslation: We should strengthen environmental protection.

sourceText: 他做事总是拖泥带水，客户很不满意。
referenceTranslation: The client is very dissatisfied with his sloppy and inefficient work style.

sourceText: 这个项目要摸着石头过河，边做边调整。
referenceTranslation: We need to take a trial-and-error approach in this project and adjust as we go.

sourceText: 问题已经解决了。
referenceTranslation: The problem has been solved.

sourceText: The proposal put forward by a researcher who joined the team only three months ago has attracted wide attention.
referenceTranslation: 一名研究员提出了这项议案。他三个月前才加入团队，这项议案已经引起广泛关注。

sourceText: 如果你不能来，请提前告诉我们，我们可以重新安排时间。
referenceTranslation: Please let us know in advance if you cannot come, so that we can reschedule.

sourceText: The policy was designed to reduce waste and encourage companies to reuse materials.
referenceTranslation: 这项政策旨在减少浪费，并鼓励企业重复利用材料。

sourceText: 万事俱备，只欠东风。
referenceTranslation: Everything is ready; only one crucial condition is still missing.

sourceText: 你提前确认，我就安排会议室。
referenceTranslation: I will book the meeting room if you confirm in advance.

sourceText: 雨停了，我们再出发。
referenceTranslation: We will set out after the rain stops.

sourceText: 材料不齐，申请就不能受理。
referenceTranslation: The application cannot be processed unless all materials are complete.

sourceText: 价格再降一点，客户可能今天签约。
referenceTranslation: The client may sign today if the price is lowered a little more.

sourceText: 老师讲完例题，学生再分组练习。
referenceTranslation: Students will practise in groups after the teacher finishes the example.

sourceText: 没有稳定的数据，结论就站不住脚。
referenceTranslation: The conclusion will not hold unless the data are reliable.

sourceText: 路上堵车，代表团可能会晚到。
referenceTranslation: The delegation may arrive late because traffic is heavy.

sourceText: 你把问题说清楚，技术团队才能定位原因。
referenceTranslation: The technical team can identify the cause only if you describe the problem clearly.

sourceText: 政策落实得好，社区服务就会更高效。
referenceTranslation: Community services will become more efficient if the policy is implemented well.

sourceText: 方案通过后，我们马上启动试点。
referenceTranslation: We will launch the pilot as soon as the proposal is approved.

sourceText: If the supplier confirms the delivery date today, we can adjust the launch schedule.
referenceTranslation: 如果供应商今天确认交付日期，我们就可以调整发布计划。

sourceText: Because the data were collected too quickly, the research team will verify the sample again.
referenceTranslation: 由于数据收集得过快，研究团队将再次核查样本。

sourceText: Unless the weather improves, the outdoor training session will be moved online.
referenceTranslation: 如果天气没有好转，户外培训将改到线上进行。

sourceText: When the new rules take effect, small shops will need clearer price labels.
referenceTranslation: 新规定生效后，小商店需要使用更清晰的价格标签。

sourceText: Although the task looks simple, it requires careful coordination among three departments.
referenceTranslation: 虽然这项任务看起来简单，但需要三个部门仔细协调。

sourceText: Since the platform was updated last night, some users may need to log in again.
referenceTranslation: 平台昨晚更新后，部分用户可能需要重新登录。

sourceText: If demand continues to rise, the factory will add a second shift next month.
referenceTranslation: 如果需求继续增长，工厂下个月将增加第二班。

sourceText: After the students finish the listening exercise, they will compare their notes in pairs.
referenceTranslation: 学生完成听力练习后，将两人一组对照笔记。

sourceText: Because the river level is still high, residents should avoid the low bridge.
referenceTranslation: 由于河水水位仍然较高，居民应避开那座低桥。

sourceText: Once the contract is reviewed, the legal team will send us a final version.
referenceTranslation: 合同审核完成后，法务团队会把最终版本发给我们。

sourceText: 这份报告，我们明天上午必须交。
referenceTranslation: We must submit this report tomorrow morning.

sourceText: 那台旧电脑，信息中心已经安排人来修。
referenceTranslation: The IT center has arranged for someone to repair that old computer.

sourceText: 这个问题，管理层还没有给出明确答复。
referenceTranslation: Management has not given a clear response to this issue yet.

sourceText: 这条路线，游客最好避开早高峰。
referenceTranslation: Tourists should avoid this route during the morning rush hour.

sourceText: 这些药，医生建议饭后再吃。
referenceTranslation: The doctor recommends taking these medicines after meals.

sourceText: 那份申请，学校已经退回要求补充材料。
referenceTranslation: The school has returned that application and asked for additional documents.

sourceText: 这个项目，客户希望下周看到样机。
referenceTranslation: The client hopes to see a prototype of this project next week.

sourceText: 这项服务，老年人使用起来还不够方便。
referenceTranslation: This service is still not convenient enough for older users.

sourceText: 那笔费用，财务部会在月底统一结算。
referenceTranslation: The finance department will settle that expense at the end of the month.

sourceText: 这段录音，评委需要再听一遍。
referenceTranslation: The judges need to listen to this recording again.

sourceText: The form that residents submitted last week still needs a signature from the community office.
referenceTranslation: 居民上周提交了这张表格。社区办公室还需要在上面签字。

sourceText: The camera installed near the gate records only the entrance area, not the whole street.
referenceTranslation: 大门附近安装的摄像头只记录入口区域，不记录整条街。

sourceText: The training plan we discussed yesterday should be revised before it is sent to new employees.
referenceTranslation: 我们昨天讨论了培训计划。发给新员工之前，还应对它进行修改。

sourceText: The restaurant recommended by the host is popular with visitors but hard to book on weekends.
referenceTranslation: 主持人推荐了那家餐厅。它很受游客欢迎，但周末很难订位。

sourceText: The document on the manager’s desk contains the budget figures for the next quarter.
referenceTranslation: 经理桌上的那份文件包含下一季度的预算数据。

sourceText: The app used by students to reserve study rooms will be unavailable tonight.
referenceTranslation: 学生用来预约自习室的应用今晚将无法使用。

sourceText: The bridge connecting the two villages was repaired after the summer floods.
referenceTranslation: 连接两个村庄的桥在夏季洪水后得到了修复。

sourceText: The poster placed at the clinic entrance explains the new appointment process.
referenceTranslation: 诊所入口处的海报说明了新的预约流程。

sourceText: The course chosen by most first-year students focuses on academic writing.
referenceTranslation: 大多数一年级学生选择了这门课程。课程重点是学术写作。

sourceText: The package left at the front desk belongs to the visiting delegation.
referenceTranslation: 前台留下的包裹属于来访代表团。

sourceText: 团队完成了调研，整理了数据，正在准备向董事会汇报。
referenceTranslation: After completing the survey and organizing the data, the team is preparing to report to the board.

sourceText: 公司扩大了产能，优化了物流，今年有望缩短交货周期。
referenceTranslation: By expanding capacity and improving logistics, the company is expected to shorten delivery times this year.

sourceText: 政府发布了新指南，明确了审批流程，并要求各部门公开进度。
referenceTranslation: The government issued new guidelines that clarify the approval process and require departments to disclose progress.

sourceText: 研究人员收集了样本，进行了对比实验，发现结果存在明显差异。
referenceTranslation: The researchers collected samples and ran comparative experiments, finding significant differences in the results.

sourceText: 平台升级了搜索功能，增加了离线缓存，方便用户在弱网环境下使用。
referenceTranslation: The platform upgraded search and added offline caching to help users work in poor network conditions.

sourceText: 代表团参观了园区，听取了介绍，随后与企业负责人座谈。
referenceTranslation: The delegation toured the park, listened to a briefing, and then held talks with company leaders.

sourceText: 学校调整了课程表，增加了口语训练，鼓励学生进行同伴反馈。
referenceTranslation: The school adjusted the timetable, added speaking practice, and encouraged peer feedback.

sourceText: 医院优化了挂号流程，开通了线上提醒，减少了患者等待时间。
referenceTranslation: The hospital improved the registration process and launched online reminders to reduce patient waiting time.

sourceText: 社区建立了志愿者队伍，开展了安全巡查，及时处理了隐患。
referenceTranslation: The community formed a volunteer team to conduct safety inspections and address risks promptly.

sourceText: 企业引入了新设备，培训了操作人员，计划下月正式投产。
referenceTranslation: The company introduced new equipment, trained operators, and plans to begin formal production next month.

sourceText: The report prepared by the consultants after three rounds of interviews will be discussed at Monday’s meeting.
referenceTranslation: 顾问进行了三轮访谈后准备了这份报告。报告将在周一的会议上讨论。

sourceText: The proposal submitted by the city government to improve night buses has received support from commuters.
referenceTranslation: 市政府提交了一项改善夜间公交的方案。通勤者对此表示支持。

sourceText: The device developed by the engineering team for remote monitoring can send alerts within seconds.
referenceTranslation: 工程团队开发了这款远程监测设备。它能在几秒钟内发出警报。

sourceText: The article written by a student who interviewed local shop owners has been published on the school website.
referenceTranslation: 一名学生采访了当地店主，并写成这篇文章。文章已经发布在学校网站上。

sourceText: The plan revised after last week’s budget review includes fewer venues and more online sessions.
referenceTranslation: 上周预算审查后，计划作了修改。修改后的计划减少了场地数量，增加了线上场次。

sourceText: The guidelines released by the ministry for emergency shelters emphasize clear signs and accessible entrances.
referenceTranslation: 该部发布了应急避难场所指南。指南强调标识清楚、入口无障碍。

sourceText: The survey conducted among first-time users revealed confusion about the payment page.
referenceTranslation: 团队对首次使用者进行了调查。调查显示，他们对付款页面感到困惑。

sourceText: The bridge damaged by heavy rain last summer reopened after months of repair work.
referenceTranslation: 去年夏天大雨损坏了这座桥。经过数月维修，它已经重新开放。

sourceText: The training materials translated for overseas volunteers need another round of review.
referenceTranslation: 这些培训材料是为海外志愿者翻译的，还需要再审核一轮。

sourceText: The exhibition curated by young artists from the region attracted many families during the holiday.
referenceTranslation: 当地青年艺术家策划了这场展览。假日期间，许多家庭前来参观。

sourceText: 系统已经修好了，用户可以正常登录。
referenceTranslation: The system has been repaired, and users can now log in normally.

sourceText: 会议临时取消了，具体时间另行通知。
referenceTranslation: The meeting has been canceled temporarily, and the new time will be announced later.

sourceText: 这个决定让我想到，我们还需要评估长期风险。
referenceTranslation: It occurred to me from this decision that we still need to assess long-term risks.

sourceText: 这次经历让她更加重视团队沟通。
referenceTranslation: This experience made her attach greater importance to team communication.

sourceText: 通知已经发出，请各部门按要求准备材料。
referenceTranslation: The notice has been issued, and all departments are asked to prepare the required materials.

sourceText: 道路正在抢修，车辆请绕行。
referenceTranslation: The road is being repaired urgently, so vehicles should take an alternative route.

sourceText: 这项发现说明，早期筛查非常重要。
referenceTranslation: This finding shows that early screening is very important.

sourceText: 申请已经批准，资金将在本周拨付。
referenceTranslation: The application has been approved, and the funds will be allocated this week.

sourceText: 这个变化让我们意识到，用户需求正在变得更细分。
referenceTranslation: This change has made us realize that user needs are becoming more segmented.

sourceText: 问题已经记录，客服会在两个工作日内回复。
referenceTranslation: The issue has been recorded, and customer service will respond within two working days.

sourceText: The problem was solved after the engineers checked the server logs.
referenceTranslation: 工程师检查服务器日志后解决了这个问题。

sourceText: The patient was advised to rest for three days before returning to work.
referenceTranslation: 医生建议患者休息三天后再回去工作。

sourceText: The old warehouse was converted into a community library last year.
referenceTranslation: 去年，人们把旧仓库改造成了社区图书馆。

sourceText: The safety notice was posted at every entrance before the event began.
referenceTranslation: 活动开始前，工作人员在每个入口张贴了安全提示。

sourceText: The damaged files were recovered by the support team within an hour.
referenceTranslation: 支持团队在一小时内恢复了损坏的文件。

sourceText: The village was connected to the new water supply system in April.
referenceTranslation: 四月，新供水系统接入了这个村庄。

sourceText: The proposal was rejected because it lacked a clear budget plan.
referenceTranslation: 由于缺少清晰的预算方案，这项提案没有获批。

sourceText: The museum was designed to guide visitors through local history step by step.
referenceTranslation: 博物馆的设计引导参观者一步步了解当地历史。

sourceText: The warning message was displayed when users entered an invalid code.
referenceTranslation: 用户输入无效代码时，页面会显示警告信息。

sourceText: The results were reviewed by two independent experts before publication.
referenceTranslation: 发布前，两名独立专家审核了这些结果。

sourceText: 我们要推进校园安全管理的工作。
referenceTranslation: We should improve campus safety management.

sourceText: 企业需要解决物流成本过高的问题。
referenceTranslation: Companies need to reduce excessive logistics costs.

sourceText: 请大家提高节约用水的意识。
referenceTranslation: Please become more aware of water conservation.

sourceText: 这个平台存在信息更新不及时的情况。
referenceTranslation: This platform does not update information promptly.

sourceText: 部门要加强数据共享方面的合作。
referenceTranslation: Departments should strengthen data-sharing cooperation.

sourceText: 如果流程再简化，群众办事会更方便。
referenceTranslation: If the process is simplified further, public services will become more convenient.

sourceText: 我们要持续改善空气质量状况。
referenceTranslation: We should continue to improve air quality.

sourceText: 学校正在研究提高课堂互动水平的办法。
referenceTranslation: The school is exploring ways to improve classroom interaction.

sourceText: 项目组需要避免重复建设的问题。
referenceTranslation: The project team needs to avoid duplicate construction.

sourceText: 有疑问及时反馈，我们可以当天处理。
referenceTranslation: If you have questions, report them promptly so that we can handle them the same day.

sourceText: The program aims to improve waste sorting and reduce unnecessary packaging.
referenceTranslation: 这个项目旨在改进垃圾分类，并减少不必要的包装。

sourceText: If residents report problems early, maintenance workers can respond before the damage spreads.
referenceTranslation: 如果居民尽早报告问题，维修人员就能在损害扩大前处理。

sourceText: The new form removes repeated questions and shortens the application process.
referenceTranslation: 新表格删除了重复问题，缩短了申请流程。

sourceText: Because the notice was unclear, many visitors waited in the wrong line.
referenceTranslation: 由于通知不够清楚，许多访客排错了队。

sourceText: The team reduced meeting time by combining three weekly updates into one report.
referenceTranslation: 团队把每周三次更新合并成一份报告，从而减少了会议时间。

sourceText: Unless the old data are cleaned first, the dashboard will continue to show misleading trends.
referenceTranslation: 如果不先清理旧数据，仪表盘会继续显示误导性的趋势。

sourceText: The service center simplified the refund steps and removed two unnecessary approvals.
referenceTranslation: 服务中心简化了退款步骤，并取消了两个不必要的审批环节。

sourceText: Although the campaign attracted attention, its message was repeated too often.
referenceTranslation: 虽然这次活动吸引了关注，但它的信息重复得太多。

sourceText: The school combined similar courses so students could spend more time practising.
referenceTranslation: 学校合并了相似课程，让学生有更多时间练习。

sourceText: The office reduced paperwork because most certificates can now be verified online.
referenceTranslation: 由于大多数证明现在可以在线核验，办公室减少了纸质材料。

sourceText: 这个建议有点画蛇添足，反而让方案更复杂。
referenceTranslation: This suggestion is unnecessary and makes the plan more complicated.

sourceText: 他说话总是拐弯抹角，客户听得很费劲。
referenceTranslation: He always speaks indirectly, which makes it hard for clients to follow him.

sourceText: 团队不能临阵磨枪，发布前才补测试。
referenceTranslation: The team should not rush preparations at the last minute and add tests only before launch.

sourceText: 这个品牌想借东风，赶上绿色消费的趋势。
referenceTranslation: The brand wants to ride the momentum of green consumption.

sourceText: 别把这个问题踢皮球，各部门要一起解决。
referenceTranslation: Do not pass the problem around; all departments should solve it together.

sourceText: 她在汇报中一针见血地指出了风险。
referenceTranslation: In her report, she pointed out the risk directly and precisely.

sourceText: 项目刚起步，大家还在摸着石头过河。
referenceTranslation: The project is still at an early stage, and everyone is learning through trial and error.

sourceText: 这次合作不能只看眼前利益，要放长线。
referenceTranslation: This cooperation should look beyond immediate gains and take a long-term view.

sourceText: 他把复杂概念讲得深入浅出，学生很容易理解。
referenceTranslation: He explained the complex idea clearly and accessibly, so students could understand it easily.

sourceText: 这个案例提醒我们，不能头痛医头、脚痛医脚。
referenceTranslation: This case reminds us not to treat symptoms in isolation without addressing the root cause.

sourceText: The manager said the team should not put all its eggs in one basket.
referenceTranslation: 经理说，团队不应把所有希望都押在一个方案上。

sourceText: The speaker cut to the chase and explained the main risk in the first minute.
referenceTranslation: 发言人开门见山，在第一分钟就说明了主要风险。

sourceText: The company tried to ride the wave of online learning during the holiday season.
referenceTranslation: 公司试图借助假期线上学习的热潮。

sourceText: The teacher used a down-to-earth example to explain a difficult grammar point.
referenceTranslation: 老师用一个接地气的例子解释了一个难语法点。

sourceText: The proposal looks impressive, but it may be more style than substance.
referenceTranslation: 这项提案看起来很亮眼，但可能形式大于内容。

sourceText: The campaign turned a small local story into a powerful public message.
referenceTranslation: 这次活动把一个地方小故事转化成了有力量的公共信息。

sourceText: The team learned the hard way that shortcuts can create bigger problems later.
referenceTranslation: 团队吃一堑长一智，明白走捷径以后可能造成更大问题。

sourceText: The host broke the ice by asking guests to share a childhood memory.
referenceTranslation: 主持人请嘉宾分享童年记忆，以此打破僵局。

sourceText: The article warns readers not to judge a policy by its slogan alone.
referenceTranslation: 文章提醒读者，不要只凭口号评价一项政策。

sourceText: The volunteer said small acts of kindness can snowball into real community change.
referenceTranslation: 志愿者说，小小善举可以逐渐汇聚成真正的社区改变。
